{"id":"project-LICHEN-p8i6","title":"Zephyr impl: Yggdrasil address as primary","description":"## Overview

Update Zephyr/C implementation to use Yggdrasil-derived 02xx addresses as primary.

## Changes

### Address derivation (lichen/subsys/lichen/crypto/ or identity/)
```c
int lichen_yggdrasil_addr(const uint8_t pubkey[32], struct in6_addr *out);
```
- SHA-512 hash of pubkey
- Truncate and format per Yggdrasil spec
- Return 02xx address

### Network interface (lichen/subsys/lichen/net/)
- Remove: ULA address configuration
- Add: Yggdrasil address to net_if
- Keep: link-local address

### Routing
- Update lichen_route_lookup() or equivalent
- Check if 02xx destination is local mesh
- If not local, forward to gateway for Yggdrasil

### Kconfig
- Remove: CONFIG_LICHEN_ULA_PREFIX
- Add: (nothing needed, Yggdrasil addr is derived, not configured)

## Gateway changes
- Gateway routing table: 02xx local vs 02xx remote
- Forward remote 02xx to Yggdrasil interface

## Tests
- Unit test: Yggdrasil address derivation
- Integration: local 02xx routing
- Integration: cross-gateway 02xx routing (with mock Yggdrasil)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:55:31.601796Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T20:55:31.601796Z","labels":["zephyr","c","addressing","yggdrasil"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-p8i6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-nqz6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:55:31.76715Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Yggdrasil 02xx derivation implemented+tested bit-exact across Rust/C/Python. ULA removed, node addressing/routing/Kconfig updated. 3 codereview passes per lang completed. Cargo test, pytest, west native_sim all PASS. No ULA remnants.
